title: 5 PCS Silicone Steamer Mat Non-Stick Mats for Dumplings Buns Cooking Dim Sum 20cm Bamboo Steamer Mat for Home Kitchen Cooking Reusable Steamer Liners Round Mesh Pads
features: 【Package Includes】: This set includes 5 silicone steamer mats, each measuring 20 cm in diameter. Perfect for making multiple batches of steamed treats at once, these mats are designed to fit a variety of steamers and pots, making it easy to share delicious meals with family and friends.

【Premium Quality Material】: Crafted from durable, high-quality silicone, these steamer mats are built to last. They are heat-resistant, safe to use, and designed to withstand high temperatures without losing their shape. Ideal for steaming dim sum, rice cakes, and other delicacies, you can trust these mats to be both reliable and long-lasting.

【Non-Stick & Reusable】: Featuring a non-stick surface, these silicone mats prevent food from sticking during steaming, making cleanup a breeze. The smooth, easy-release surface keeps your food intact and hygienic, while also ensuring your steamer stays clean.

【Uniform Pore Design】: The mats are designed with small, evenly distributed pores that promote excellent airflow, allowing steam to circulate evenly. This ensures thorough cooking while preserving the food’s natural nutrients, giving you soft and delicious dim sum every time.

【Wide Application】: These silicone steamer mats are perfect for steaming traditional Asian treats like dumplings, buns, and dim sum. They are also widely used in the food processing industry and serve as an essential accessory for steamers, steam cabinets, and other cooking applications.
description: This set of 5 durable, heat-resistant mats makes steaming your favorite dishes easier and more efficient. Whether you're preparing dim sum, dumplings, or rice cakes, these mats provide a non-stick, reusable surface that ensures your food steams perfectly every time. With a smart design that promotes even airflow, these mats guarantee delicious, evenly cooked meals, while keeping your steamer clean and your food intact. Perfect for any kitchen or steamer, they’ll become an essential tool for every cook. Benefits of Using Silicone Steamer Mesh Mats 1. Non-Stick & Easy to Clean: The non-stick silicone surface ensures your dumplings, buns, and other steamed treats slide off easily, making both cooking and cleanup effortless. Simply rinse or toss in the dishwasher, and you're done! 2. Even Steam Circulation for Perfect Cooking: Thanks to the mesh design and evenly distributed pores, these mats allow steam to circulate uniformly, ensuring your food is cooked thoroughly while preserving its natural flavors and nutrients. Expect soft, fluffy dumplings and perfectly steamed treats every time. 3. Durable & Reusable: Crafted from high-quality, heat-resistant silicone, these mats are built to last. Unlike paper liners or disposable mats, these are durable, reusable, and can withstand high temperatures without losing shape. How to Use: 1. Place a silicone steamer mat at the bottom of your steamer basket or pot. 2. Arrange your food items (dim sum, buns, dumplings, etc.) on the mat, making sure they don’t touch each other to allow steam circulation. 3. Steam as usual, adjusting time based on the food you're preparing. 4. After use, simply wash the mat with warm water or place it in the dishwasher for easy cleaning.
